title: unsafe_validate_unique plus unique_constraint pair
prompt: Add pre-insert unique validation to MyApp.Accounts.User for the email field. Use BOTH unsafe_validate_unique(:email, MyApp.Repo) for early friendly error and unique_constraint(:email) to catch the DB-level race. Also write the migration creating the users table with a unique_index. Schema to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex, migration to priv/repo/migrations/20260412000000_create_users.exs.
tier_rationale: Three-part coordination (unsafe_validate_unique + unique_constraint + unique_index). Sonnet usually picks one or two but skips unsafe_validate_unique.
research_citation: Arrowsmith Labs — Foolproof uniqueness validations in Phoenix with Ecto.
